metadata.title: Hyreel - AI Video Generator | Turn Photos into Viral Videos
metadata.description: Create viral TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts from photos in minutes. AI-powered video effects, no editing skills needed. Start free.

hero.title: Turn Photos Into
hero.description: No editing skills needed. Hyreel's AI creates scroll-stopping TikToks, Reels, and Shorts from a single photo.

features.title: Why Creators Love Hyreel
features.subtitle: Professional video creation without the learning curve

items.title: Photo to Video AI
items.description: Upload any photo and watch our AI transform it into a dynamic video with cinematic motion effects.

items.title: Cinematic Effects
items.description: Professional zoom, orbit, parallax, and follow effects that make your content stand out.

items.title: Platform Optimized
items.description: Export in perfect formats for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and more.

items.title: AI Voice & Music
items.description: Add professional voiceovers and background music to complete your videos.

items.title: Lightning Fast
items.description: Create professional videos in seconds, not hours. Perfect for daily content creation.

items.title: No Watermark
items.description: Clean, professional videos ready for your brand. No watermarks on paid plans.

howItWorks.title: Create Videos in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From photo to viral video in under a minute

steps.title: Upload Your Photo
steps.description: Choose any photo from your camera roll or library

steps.title: Choose an Effect
steps.description: Select from zoom, orbit, parallax, and more AI effects

steps.title: Export & Share
steps.description: Download or share directly to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube

cta.title: Ready to Create Viral Content?
cta.description: Join thousands of creators making scroll-stopping videos with AI. Start free — no credit card required.

footer.tagline: AI-powered video creation for creators, brands, and businesses.
